race.description: Perricoota Station Fillies & Mares BM56 Hcp
race.comment: MISS ELLANEOUS (3) was handy enough but lacked the change of gears required when third last start over this distance at Stawell. Blinkers go on for the first time today which might be what the doctor ordered. Capable of taking this out. FIRST FIFTEEN (7) has been disappointing in two runs since collecting her maiden win first-up at Sale. Given a seven-week let-up which might do the trick. Can be highly competitive on her best form. ZUPPA INGLESE (6) is back from a 14-week break. Opened the last prep impressively, beaten a long neck over a shorter trip at Wangaratta before winning her maiden impressively at Werribee. Placed in a recent trial and looks set for another positive return. QUEEN OF THE SURF (2) can make her mark first-up off the back of two recent jump-outs. SWEATER GIRL (8) will be better for this run but can sneak into the trifecta and first four numbers without surprising.
